title: Project Report: End-to-End Business Metrics Platform — Data Analyst
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Automated weekly KPI report: SQL extraction, Python pipeline, validation checks, and email delivery.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Advanced)*

**End-to-End Business Metrics Platform** is a advanced-level end-to-end project for Data Analyst. Duration: 4–5 weeks. Automated weekly KPI report: SQL extraction, Python pipeline, validation checks, and email delivery. Tools: Python, SQL, Great Expectations, Jinja2.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Automate data extraction with Python
Objective: Data quality validation rules
Objective: Scheduled report generation
Objective: Document data dictionary
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Data Analyst portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Data Analyst resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Data Analyst resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: Pipeline
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Pipeline** *(Level: Advanced)*

Extract-transform-load script. Complete these tasks: SQL → pandas; Schedule cron. Deliverable for this phase: pipeline.py.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] SQL → pandas
- [ ] Schedule cron
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase Pipeline is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it
During week 1 of the project timeline.

### Where to use it
Data Analyst agile sprints and coursework milestones.

### Real use example
Team demo shows the pipeline.py to the teacher.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Advanced)*

Submit all final deliverables: Pipeline code; Quality report; Sample weekly report; Data dictionary. Skills demonstrated: ETL, Data quality, Automation. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Pipeline code
Deliverable: Quality report
Deliverable: Sample weekly report
Deliverable: Data dictionary
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Pipeline code and passes the rubric.
key_takeaways: Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.
